calendar.matters:
Referee'S Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant To Interlocutory Judgment Dated April 27. 2010; Proposed Final Distribution And Request To Be Discharged As Referee
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Line 55 CGC-09-487085: Julio Ramos appeared on behalf of Amy Harrington as referee.

Mr. Ramos assured the Court that all charges set out in the interlocutory judgment had been satisfied. No one appeared to object. The motion for final distribution and discharge was granted subject to review of the order.

Notes taken by Judge Peter J. Busch.

Referee'S Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant To Interlocutory Judgment Dated April 27. 2010; Proposed Final Distribution And Request To Be Discharged As Referee
Off Calendar Jul-02-2012 Continued To Jul-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Referee'S Report Of Sale And Motion For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant To Interlocutory Judgment Dated April 27, 2010; Declaration Of Request For Expedited Hearing
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AMY HARRINGTON Referee'S Report Of Sale And Motion For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant To Interlocutory Judgment Dated April 27, 2010; Declaration Of Request For Expedited Hearing

Appearances: Julio Ramos for and with Amy Harrington. Casimir Wilson for Larry Miles.

The sale was confirmed in the amount of $397,000.00 for the property located at 267 Bright Street in San Francisco. The Court granted the petition subject to filing of an Amended Proof of Service showing that the County of San Joaquin was served, the question of interest of 10 percent on the fees, Mr. Ramos preparing a revised order reflecting the actual Unlawful Detainer fees and a declaration itemizing Ms. Harrington's fees/costs.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
